016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.classic.remote;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021
022import java.lang.reflect.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.http.remote.*;
026
027/**
028 * Contains the meta-data about a Java method on a remote class.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Captures the information in {@link Remote @Remote} annotations for caching and reuse.
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestRpc">REST/RPC</a>
035 * </ul>
036 */
037public class RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta {
038
039   /**
040    * Given a Java method, returns the arguments signature.
041    *
042    * @param m The Java method.
043    * @param full Whether fully-qualified names should be used for arguments.
044    * @return The arguments signature for the specified method.
045    */
046   private static String getMethodArgsSignature(Method m) {
047      var sb = new StringBuilder(128);
048      Class<?>[] pt = m.getParameterTypes();
049      if (pt.length == 0)
050         return "";
051      sb.append('(');
052      for (var i = 0; i < pt.length; i++) {
053         var pti = ClassInfo.of(pt[i]);
054         if (i > 0)
055            sb.append(',');
056         pti.appendNameFormatted(sb, ClassNameFormat.FULL, true, '$', ClassArrayFormat.BRACKETS);
057      }
058      sb.append(')');
059      return sb.toString();
060   }
061
062   private final String url;
063   private final String path;
064
065   private final Method method;
066
067   /**
068    * Constructor.
069    *
070    * @param restUrl The absolute URL of the REST interface backing the interface proxy.
071    * @param m The Java method.
072    */
073   public RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(String restUrl, Method m) {
074      this.method = m;
075      this.path = m.getName() + '/' + getMethodArgsSignature(m);
076      this.url = trimSlashes(restUrl) + '/' + urlEncode(path);
077   }
078
079   /**
080    * Returns the underlying Java method that this metadata is about.
081    *
082    * @return
083    *    The underlying Java method that this metadata is about.
084    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
085    */
086   public Method getJavaMethod() { return method; }
087
088   /**
089    * Returns the HTTP path of this method.
090    *
091    * @return
092    *    The HTTP path of this method relative to the parent interface.
093    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
094    *    <br>Never has leading or trailing slashes.
095    */
096   public String getPath() { return path; }
097
098   /**
099    * Returns the absolute URL of the REST interface invoked by this Java method.
100    *
101    * @return The absolute URL of the REST interface, never <jk>null</jk>.
102    */
103   public String getUri() { return url; }
104
105   @Override
106   public boolean equals(Object o) {
107      return o instanceof RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta other && eq(this, other, (x, y) -> x.method.equals(y.method));
108   }
109
110   @Override
111   public int hashCode() {
112      return method.hashCode();
113   }
114}
